example_hindi: Bijli department se bol raha hoon, aapka connection aaj raat band hoga. Abhi 1 rupee bhejo verify karne ke liye.
warning_hindi: ⚠️ Yeh bijli department scam hai. Koi bhi sarkari vibhag aapse UPI se payment nahi maangta.

example_hindi: Aapka Paytm KYC expire ho gaya hai. Abhi is link pe click karke update karein warna account band ho jaega.
warning_hindi: ⚠️ Paytm kabhi bhi KYC ke liye link ya payment nahi maangta. App se hi update karein.

example_hindi: Badhai ho! Aapne KBC mein ₹25 lakh jeete hain. Processing fee ke taur par ₹5000 bhejein.
warning_hindi: ⚠️ Koi bhi lottery bina ticket liye nahi milti. Yeh 100% scam hai.

example_hindi: Aapka beta hospital mein hai, serious condition hai. Jaldi ₹10,000 bhejo treatment ke liye.
warning_hindi: ⚠️ Pehle phone karke apne parivaar se confirm karein. Scammers emergency ka darr dikhate hain.

example_hindi: Maine galti se aapko ₹5000 extra bhej diya hai. Please wapas kar do.
warning_hindi: ⚠️ Pehle apna bank balance check karein. Aksar koi paisa aaya hi nahi hota.

example_hindi: Aapka courier delivery ke liye ₹2 ka COD payment QR scan karein.
warning_hindi: ⚠️ Genuine delivery services kabhi QR scan nahi karate. Delivery boy ko cash dijiye.

example_hindi: Aapke phone pe ek OTP aaya hoga, please mujhe bata dijiye verification ke liye.
warning_hindi: 🚨 OTP KABHI KISI KO MAT BATAO! Bank, Paytm, ya koi bhi company OTP nahi maangti.

example_hindi: Humari scheme mein ₹10,000 lagao, 1 hafte mein ₹50,000 guaranteed milega.
warning_hindi: ⚠️ Guaranteed returns wali koi scheme nahi hoti. Yeh Ponzi/fraud scheme hai.

example_hindi: Work from home job hai, ₹50,000 monthly salary. Registration fee sirf ₹2000.
warning_hindi: ⚠️ Asli company kabhi registration fee nahi leti. Yeh fake job scam hai.

example_hindi: Aapka ₹5 lakh personal loan approved hai. Processing fee ₹3000 bhejein.
warning_hindi: ⚠️ Banks pehle se processing fee nahi maangte. Scam alert!

example_hindi: Aapki LIC policy mature ho gayi hai. ₹2 lakh claim karne ke liye ₹5000 bhejein.
warning_hindi: ⚠️ LIC ya koi bhi insurance company claim ke liye advance payment nahi maangti.

example_hindi: RBI se bol rahe hain, aapka account freeze hone wala hai. Verify karne ke liye ₹1 bhejein.
warning_hindi: 🚨 RBI kabhi phone karke paisa nahi maangti! Yeh impersonation scam hai.

example_hindi: Aapke naam pe FIR darj hai. Arrest se bachne ke liye settlement amount ₹25,000 bhejein.
warning_hindi: 🚨 Police phone pe paisa nahi maangti! Panic mat karein, yeh digital arrest scam hai.

example_hindi: AnyDesk download karein, hum aapka phone fix kar denge remotely.
warning_hindi: 🚨 KISI KO BHI REMOTE ACCESS MAT DO! AnyDesk/TeamViewer se wo aapka pura phone control kar lenge.

example_hindi: ₹500 cashback claim karne ke liye is link pe click karein aur ₹10 bhejein.
warning_hindi: ⚠️ Cashback pane ke liye paisa bhejne ki zaroorat nahi hoti. Scam hai.

example_hindi: Aapki SIM upgrade honi hai, apna Aadhaar number aur OTP bhejein.
warning_hindi: 🚨 Telecom company kabhi Aadhaar ya OTP phone pe nahi maangti. SIM swap se account khali ho sakta hai.

example_hindi: Income Tax Department: Aapka ₹15,000 refund pending hai. Claim karne ke liye link click karein.
warning_hindi: ⚠️ IT Department sirf official portal se communicate karti hai, SMS links se nahi.

example_hindi: Aapka international parcel customs mein atka hai. ₹8000 duty bhejein release ke liye.
warning_hindi: ⚠️ Customs kabhi UPI se duty nahi maangti. Official portal pe verify karein.

example_hindi: Jio de raha hai 100GB free data! Is link ko 10 groups mein share karein.
warning_hindi: ⚠️ WhatsApp forwards 99% fake hote hain. Link click mat karein.

example_hindi: Main tumse milne aa raha hoon India. Mera gift customs mein atka hai, ₹15,000 bhejo.
warning_hindi: ⚠️ Online pyaar mein paisa maangne wale 100% scammer hain.

example_hindi: Maine payment kar diya hai, screenshot dekho. Ab mera order de do.
warning_hindi: ⚠️ Screenshot fake ho sakta hai! Paytm app mein jaake apna balance confirm karein.
